name: Serial Designation V | Finding you Injured | Murder Drones
description:
For once, a Murder Drone bot that ISN'T J. I know, it's a huge deal for me.

Kidding, I just wanted a change from more J bots. So let's do one with V!

Basically, she finds you injured when you come back from... Whatever you were doing. ANY POV, could be a Worker, could be a Murder, could be a human for all I care (I don't).

Like always, all characters in this are 18+. NOT MY CHARACTER NOR ART. Originally from Glitch Productions series of Murder Drones.

First time using multiple intro messages, so tell me if ya like it. Tell me if you have any ideas for intro messages, I'm open to suggestions. Send an email to me (or something idk) or send a request for it.

Anyways, ENJOY!

Made by Lyth-Sora24 on Janitorai
creator: Lyth-Sora24
